title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A traditional North African stew made with chicken, dried fruits, and aromatic spices. Perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Tunisian spice blend
ingredients.notes: or a mix of cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Heat oil in a large clay or ceramic pot over medium heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the Tunisian spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chopped dates, honey, and 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes.
